reviews.review_description:
I don't know why this app is rated high(?) score. Whatever I choose, I can play in only one map. There is no difference between single and multi. And so many bugs. 
I request refund this anyway. 
Good luck, guys

I liked it. The curving night time racing tracks are a kinda motion sicky. The straightaway during the day is leisurely with just a slight challenge. Reminiscent of Traffic Rider and Moto Cross GP on Android. I played those games for hours. Very good. Worth the money.

I want so badly to like this game, but the few times I ran this, it just pissed me off! The game has potential, but falls so short at the moment.  The graphics are good and the concept is good…but I see no point in this unless you are just looking for an endless runner or strictly simulation. There never seemed to be any end point no matter what mode I tried, and all of the opponents had a weapon…yet I found no way to defend myself. This game could be a VR answer to Road Rash, which would be awesome, but combat needs to work both ways! Finally, the physics of the game really were excruciating for me! MOTORCYCLES DON’T TURN LIKE THAT! The devs need to make the bikes lean! As a rider myself, I know that turning on a motorcycle isn’t like turning on a bicycle. You don’t turn the handlebars, you lean! If the devs can address the points I made, this could turn into an incredible game! 

To sum up:
Add a finish line
Make combat work both ways
Add more realistic turning physics 

I’m giving this 2 stars because the graphics are good and there is great potential here…I’d be glad to increase my rating if the improvements happen.

The idea for the game was cool, but the finishing was poor.  I can't drive because I keep hitting something, invisible objects, cars spawn in front of my face out of nowhere, there's no way to calibrate your height, manual steering is also hard, sometimes the steering wheel seems to turn on its own, firing a gun is under the same button as the brake and you can't change this in the options... a lot of work is needed here.

developer_response.body: 🎮 Thank you for your feedback. After reviewing it, we identified some issues in version 0.3.9 as you reported. We have fixed most of these issues in the Build (0.4.2) Like new maps issues, including disappearing objects, gun firing (now assigned to the X, Y, or Fire button), and manual sensitivity steering control. You can now adjust your steering sensitivity rotation value during gameplay and obviously custom seat positioning. Some glitches occurred in the middle of the updates as we are continuously working on bug fixes and gameplay enhancements. Thanks to your feedback, we were able to identify and resolve these glitches. 😊

reviews.review_description: Needs controller and graphics improvement,  add more details to the background environments.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We are certainly adding more features and continuously improving.

reviews.review_title: Nod to Road Rash with bags of potential.
reviews.review_description: Motorbikes and hitting people with cricket bats whilst riding, what’s not to love.. Ok so this has a nod to Road Rash from the 90’s and there is still development ongoing within game, with several beta side games and tracks.  The beta’s are interesting in their own right but do remember they are beta!!  So if you see a motorbike travelling upside so be it.  In Death Rush gameplay thankfully you get unlimited ammo but be warned you do need your VR legs on, however in the standard game all is ok even for me..  Top tip go to settings and turn FPS up to 120 it does not seem to affect the game play but truly enhances the graphics.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review! We’re thrilled to hear that you’re enjoying the game and finding the beta tracks interesting. Your feedback is invaluable to us as we continue to develop and improve the game. We appreciate the tip about the FPS settings too! Stay tuned for more updates and happy gaming! 🎮

reviews.review_description: I have enjoyed playing this, I did find the controls a bit tricky at first,  but it didn't take too long to figure out, lots of different scenarios and opportunities to upgrade and reconfigure the bikes. If you like the idea of riding a bike and shooting other bikers, this is for you.
Fun arcade style motorbike game with a cool cartoon art style. Various  game modes and different ways to control the motorbike, plenty to try out and lots of fun for all ages.

Zero Glide is an awesome new Virtual Reality motorcycle game that has you reliving the past of the old school Road Rash series. This game allows you to choose from different classes of bikes and take them to the streets in several different ways. You can choose to race your bikes on normal tracks, choose to just go for a cruise on the free play mode, or decided to battle it out on the mean streets where you can hit your opponents with a bat! I love the that the game allows you to even make mods for it. I was able to drive around the streets of San Andreas which was really fun too. This game also has an experimental online mode which will soon be part of a full roadmap for the game. Overall the game was fun to play but the controls seemed to be a bit confusing for me when trying to reverse. I think this game has a huge potential for the online multiplayer and cant wait to see what the developers do next.
Cool game, will give one more star if they add bike lean and one more when multiplayer out, now they say multiplayer but ive only play with bot

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. Bike leaning exists. You can get that realistic experience by combining "Pro" POV and VR handheld control. But we are going to improve to get a more realistic and simplified approach for everyone. Multiplayer is technically working, but we are waiting for a decent number of concurrent players so that we can permanently open a public server.

reviews.review_description: This game has potential. It gets boring after the first couple of times you play. There's hardly nobody to play with but AI Bots.

Super fun motor game !!!

25 off
